major_electives: Advanced ECE/CS technical electives (400-level, department approved)
notes: Heavy hardware-software integration. Includes digital systems lab and computer systems engineering sequence.

major_electives: Advanced ECE technical electives in communications, electronics, signals, or power systems
notes: Focus on circuits, electronics, electromagnetics, and signal processing. Flexible specialization paths.

major_electives: Mechanical engineering technical electives (thermal sciences, mechanics, controls, manufacturing)
notes: Includes CAD, thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, and heat transfer. Senior capstone design required.

major_electives: Civil engineering primary field electives (structural, environmental, transportation, geotechnical)
notes: Students select a specialization track within civil engineering. Senior design project required.

major_electives: Aerospace technical electives (aerodynamics, propulsion, structures, controls)
notes: Includes aerodynamics, propulsion, flight mechanics, and a two-semester capstone sequence.

major_electives: Industrial engineering electives (operations research, supply chain, data analytics, quality)
notes: Strong statistics and optimization focus. Includes operations research and systems modeling.

major_electives: Chemical engineering technical electives (transport, kinetics, biochemical, materials)
notes: Core includes transport phenomena, reaction engineering, and plant design sequence.

major_electives: Bioengineering electives (biomechanics, computational bio, imaging, systems biology)
notes: Interdisciplinary engineering degree integrating biology, computation, and medical systems.
